title: rubus punctulatus
intro: Rubus punctulatus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, as well as supporting the immune system. Rubus punctulatus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
